description: Crafted from high-grade diamond ripstop, strengthened to withstand any amount of use, and sized to transport all the gear you need for your next mission, the North Star tactical duffle bag is the ultimate bag for your needs. Versatile enough for every day or travel use. Reinforced grab-and-go handles allow you to adapt your carry style to your loadout, and a detachable carry strap provides a more comfortable option when covering long distances. Complete wrap-around handles of strong nylon webbing keep your goods at the tip of your fingers. A heavy duty, two-way zipper provides complete and immediate access to your gear. Construction-grade zipper to ensure consistent and reliable action. For a duffle bag that won't slow you down, grab a North Star bag.
